forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 85, with temperatures falling to around 82 in the afternoon. West wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 66. Northwest wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between noon and 1pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 4pm and 5pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 83. North northeast wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 61. North northeast wind 3 to 8 mph.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
